'''gasulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sqround|sqround]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-s-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sqround|sqround]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gasulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæsilith|gæsilith]] || [[word:gæsilij|gæsilij]] || [[word:gæsilish|gæsilish]] || [[word:gæsili|gæsili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gasusuluth|gasusuluth]] || [[word:gasusuluj|gasusuluj]] || [[word:gasusulush|gasusulush]] || [[word:gasusulu|gasusulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gasuluth|gasuluth]] || [[word:gasuluj|gasuluj]] || [[word:gasulush|gasulush]] || [[word:gasulu|gasulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gasufluth|gasufluth]] || [[word:gasufluj|gasufluj]] || [[word:gasuflush|gasuflush]] || [[word:gasufluf|gasufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gasuluthu|gasuluthu]] || [[word:gasuluju|gasuluju]] || [[word:gasulushu|gasulushu]] || [[word:gasuluku|gasuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gasuluth|gasuluth]] || [[word:gasuluj|gasuluj]] || [[word:gasulush|gasulush]] || [[word:gasulu|gasulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gasuluthul|gasuluthul]] || [[word:gasulujul|gasulujul]] || [[word:gasulushul|gasulushul]] || [[word:gasulukul|gasulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gasuluthuthu|gasuluthuthu]] || [[word:gasulujuju|gasulujuju]] || [[word:gasulushushu|gasulushushu]] || [[word:gasuluku|gasuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gasuluthun|gasuluthun]] || [[word:gasulujun|gasulujun]] || [[word:gasulushun|gasulushun]] || [[word:gasulukun|gasulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gasuluthuoro|gasuluthuoro]] || [[word:gasulujuoro|gasulujuoro]] || [[word:gasulushuoro|gasulushuoro]] || [[word:gasulukuoro|gasulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
